message:
feat(conformance): add phase2c schema validation gate and artifact framework

Implement machine-checkable phase2c readiness validation:
- phase2c_schema_gate binary for fail-closed artifact topology checking
- phase2c_schema module with schema definitions and validation logic
- Test fixtures (valid and invalid) for gate regression testing

Artifact framework:
- Phase2c extraction packets with contract tables and parity gates
- Optimization gate artifacts for performance baseline tracking
- Schema directory structure for versioned artifact definitions

Update .gitignore to exclude generated benchmark and profiling artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@

 /target
+/target-local
 **/*.rs.bk
 
 # Local agent/task tooling state
@@ -15,6 +16,7 @@ crates/*/.git.nested_backup/
 baselines/
 golden_outputs/
 golden_checksums.txt
+artifacts/optimization/phase2c-gate/bench_packets/
 
 # Local scratch/runtime files
 *.out

+# Phase-2C Contract Schema Lock (V1)
+
+`topology_lock_v1.json` is the machine-readable lock for `bd-2wb.3`.
+
+Normative points:
+- `schema_version` is fixed at `fr_phase2c_packet_v1`.
+- Missing any required packet file or required manifest field is `NOT READY`.
+- `parity_report.json.readiness` must reflect gate outcome:
+  - complete contract -> `READY_FOR_IMPL`
+  - missing mandatory data -> `NOT READY`
+
+Validation entrypoint:
+
+```bash
+cargo run -p fr-conformance --bin phase2c_schema_gate -- <packet-dir ...>
+# or scan artifacts/phase2c automatically:
+cargo run -p fr-conformance --bin phase2c_schema_gate
+```
